meaning: n.[植]莴苣,生菜,苦菜类,<俚>纸币
examples: Lettuce was grown by the ancient Romans.
The salad consisted of a few leaves of sad-looking lettuce.
Why does it feel like even the lettuce is out to get us?
Items like lettuce stay fresh for a month instead of two or three days.
Spouts have been targeted as the culprit and cucumbers, tomatoes and lettuce were early suspects.
